screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.title: UTokyo OPAC
screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.subtitle: The University of Tokyo Library OPAC
screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.banner: Search books, journals, and electronic resources held by UTokyo.
screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.hint_enter: Press Enter to search / switch tabs to change the target DB
screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.prompt: Enter a keyword to start searching.
screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.no_results: No matching records were found. Try a shorter phrase or switch the database tab.
screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.help_line_1: - UTokyo OPAC searches books, journals, and electronic resources held by the university.
screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.help_line_2: - Advanced search requires every space-separated term to be present in the matched record.
screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.help_line_3: - Switching tabs changes the mock database source, such as CiNii Books or WorldCat.
screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.help_line_4: - This is an in-game mock search with a curated set of representative records.
screen.sdm_mod.search_pc.label.author: Author
screen.sdm_mod.technical_book.left_page: Euler's formula links exponential and trigonometric functions.
screen.sdm_mod.technical_book.right_page: Substituting x = π simplifies the expression to e^(iπ) = -1.
screen.sdm_mod.technical_book.footnote: It is widely known as a beautiful identity.
screen.sdm_mod.technical_book.close_hint: Press Esc or Menu/Back to close
